name: Jez
about: Welcome to my public corner of the internet. This site is evolving into a home for projects, utilities, game prototypes, AI news, and personal creative stuff.

projects.name: How AI Works
projects.desc: Interactive explainer covering neural networks, LLMs, training, hallucinations, and more. Built with React + Framer Motion.

projects.name: AI News Feed
projects.desc: Curated AI model releases, tooling updates, and notable research.

projects.name: Game Experiments
projects.desc: Playable prototypes and mechanics tests from GameMaster runs.

projects.name: Photo Gallery
projects.desc: Personal photos, edits, and restoration showcases.

tools.name: Image Prep Utility
tools.desc: Resize + rename uploads for cleaner website workflows.

tools.name: Print Sizing / DPI Checker
tools.desc: Quickly verify output dimensions and print-safe quality.

tools.name: Filename Batch Cleaner
tools.desc: Normalize messy file names before publishing.

games.name: 👷 Hard Hat Mac
games.desc: Classic 1983 Apple II remake — 3 construction levels.

games.name: 💎 Crystal Cavern
games.desc: Descend through dark crystal caves with dynamic lighting.

games.name: 🖖 Super Star Trek
games.desc: The 70s computer classic — reborn with LCARS visuals.

games.name: 🏮 Lantern Creek
games.desc: Guide glowing lanterns down a moonlit stream.

games.name: ⚡ Neon Qix
games.desc: Modernized Qix with neon field capture.

games.name: 🎮 See all 25 games →
games.desc: The full GameMaster Arcade — featured, classic, and experimental builds.

photos.name: 🐱 Cat Corner
photos.desc: Luca, Cosmo, Taco & Marty — 30 photos and counting.

photos.name: 🌿 Garden
photos.desc: Small-space growing, seasonal progress, and green experiments.

homelab.desc: At-a-glance view of model/runtime usage and status.
